indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed obstructs the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.rationale: Pillows on the bed obstruct the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.name: nightstands
indicators.rationale: Nightstands on either side of the bed obstruct the open floor space required for yoga practice.

indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring provides a firm, non-slip base surface suitable for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: cabinet

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for yoga practice due to the presence of a bed, pillows, nightstands, and a cabinet that obstruct the open floor space required for yoga. However, the hardwood flooring and large windows contribute positively to the environment, making it suitable for yoga practice.
